summary: Comprehensive testing of Bank Statement PDF to Excel Converter - All backend APIs and frontend UI elements tested successfully. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: 8/8 tests passed. Claude AI integration working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend index.tsx is 1269 lines - consider splitting into smaller components (UploadScreen, ConfirmScreen, ProcessingScreen, ResultsScreen) for better maintainability
All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
Backend properly uses async/await and Pydantic validation
Claude AI integration via emergentintegrations working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test PDF exists at /tmp/hdfc_test_statement.pdf (provided by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested with real Claude AI integration (no mocking). Frontend UI tested on mobile viewport. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py for regression testing.

tests.name: test_upload_valid_pdf_returns_detected_format
tests.description: POST /api/upload-pdf with valid PDF returns detected format with bank_name, columns, date_format, amount_style, currency_symbol

tests.name: test_upload_non_pdf_file_returns_400
tests.description: POST /api/upload-pdf with non-PDF file returns 400 error

tests.name: test_upload_empty_file_returns_400
tests.description: POST /api/upload-pdf with empty file returns 400 error

tests.name: test_parse_transactions_returns_transactions_and_summary
tests.description: POST /api/parse-transactions returns transactions array and summary with financial data

tests.name: test_download_excel_returns_xlsx_file
tests.description: POST /api/download-excel returns valid Excel file with correct content-type and headers

tests.name: test_upload_missing_file_returns_422
tests.description: POST /api/upload-pdf without file parameter returns 422 error

tests.name: test_parse_with_invalid_payload_returns_422
tests.description: POST /api/parse-transactions with invalid payload returns 422 error

tests.name: test_excel_with_invalid_payload_returns_422
tests.description: POST /api/download-excel with invalid payload returns 422 error

tests.name: App logo visible
tests.description: PDF2Excel logo visible in top bar
